build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run --filter @mineradio/web build && bun run --filter @mineradio/desktop build:sidecar

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://*.music.126.net https://*.music.126.net http://y.qq.com https://y.qq.com http://*.y.qq.com https://*.y.qq.com http://*.gtimg.cn https://*.gtimg.cn http://*.qlogo.cn https://*.qlogo.cn https://*.douyinpic.com; media-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://ipc.localhost https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2/ https://huggingface.co/Xenova/depth-anything-small-hf/ https://huggingface.co/api/resolve-cache/models/Xenova/depth-anything-small-hf/ https://us.aws.cdn.hf.co/xet-bridge-us/65b10f1dc9a5a7680fa72994/; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5173; script-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5173 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2/; style-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5173 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://*.music.126.net https://*.music.126.net http://y.qq.com https://y.qq.com http://*.y.qq.com https://*.y.qq.com http://*.gtimg.cn https://*.gtimg.cn http://*.qlogo.cn https://*.qlogo.cn https://*.douyinpic.com; media-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:5173 https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2/ https://huggingface.co/Xenova/depth-anything-small-hf/ https://huggingface.co/api/resolve-cache/models/Xenova/depth-anything-small-hf/ https://us.aws.cdn.hf.co/xet-bridge-us/65b10f1dc9a5a7680fa72994/; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
